mapper.select: /* ESS 수익 조회 */ select b.*, c.profit_ratio as rate_per from ( select site_id, bill_yearm, avg(bdayIn_month) as bdayIn_month, sum(ess_dischg_off_peak) as ess_dischg_off_peak, sum(ess_dischg_mid_peak) as ess_dischg_mid_peak, sum(ess_dischg_max_peak) as ess_dischg_max_peak, sum(ess_chg_off_peak) as ess_chg_off_peak, sum(ess_chg_mid_peak) as ess_chg_mid_peak, sum(ess_chg_max_peak) as ess_chg_max_peak, sum(pre_ess_incen) as pre_ess_incen, sum(ess_incen) as ess_incen, sum(peak_rate) as peak_rate, sum(ewp_peak_rate) as ewp_peak_rate from ( select bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, bdayIn_month, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_chg_incen as pre_ess_incen, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen) as ess_incen, (off_peak_rate+mid_peak_rate+max_peak_rate) as peak_rate, ess_dischg_incen as ewp_peak_rate from tb_bill where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId } and bill_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo } ) a group by site_id, bill_yearm ) b, tb_site_set c where b.site_id = c.site_id order by bill_yearm

/* ESS 수익 조회 */ select site_id, bill_yearm, 90 as rate_per, avg(ess_bdayIn_month) as ess_bdayIn_month, sum(ess_dischg_off_peak) as ess_dischg_off_peak, sum(ess_dischg_mid_peak) as ess_dischg_mid_peak, sum(ess_dischg_max_peak) as ess_dischg_max_peak, sum(ess_chg_off_peak) as ess_chg_off_peak, sum(ess_chg_mid_peak) as ess_chg_mid_peak, sum(ess_chg_max_peak) as ess_chg_max_peak, sum(pre_ess_incen) as pre_ess_incen, sum(ess_incen) as ess_incen, sum(peak_rate) as peak_rate, sum(demand_chg_reduct) as demand_chg_reduct, sum(ess_chg_incen) as ess_chg_incen, sum(ess_dischg_incen) as ess_dischg_incen, sum(energy_chg_reduct) as energy_chg_reduct, sum(val_add_tax) as val_add_tax, sum(usg) as usg from ( select bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, 23 as ess_bdayIn_month, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_chg_incen as pre_ess_incen, ess_chg_incen, val_add_tax, usg, ess_dischg_incen, energy_chg_reduct, (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen) as ess_incen, (off_peak_rate+mid_peak_rate+max_peak_rate) as peak_rate, demand_chg_reduct from tb_bill where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId } and bill_yearm ="201810" ) a group by site_id, bill_yearm order by bill_yearm
